coverDownloader.page_subtitle: Batch download Steam game cover images, multiple sizes supported

Enter Steam game IDs, one per line
Example:
730
570
440
coverDownloader.usage_step2: Check the number in the URL, e.g.: store.steampowered.com/app/730
coverDownloader.usage_step3: 730 is the game ID for CS2
coverDownloader.usage_tip: Batch input supported, one game ID per line

manifestImport.usage_step3: Program automatically scans and identifies files
manifestImport.file_vdf_desc: Configuration file (will be auto-converted to Lua)

background.empty_images: No images yet, click the button above to add

globalSettings.setting_steam_path_desc: Steam installation directory path, used for importing installed Steam games and manifest import
globalSettings.setting_start_minimized_desc: Automatically hide to system tray on startup, double-click tray icon to open
globalSettings.setting_hide_tray_desc: Hide to tray on close button click and continue running in background, auto-release image cache after 2 seconds
globalSettings.alert_config_not_loaded: Configuration not loaded, please try again later
globalSettings.alert_reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset to default settings?

gameDetail.manifest_not_found: Manifest folder not found, please download manifest files first
gameDetail.download_method1_desc: Download Steam official distribution files, patch injection required after download to play
gameDetail.download_hint: (Please save to your cloud drive first to avoid removal, which also supports the developer for continuous updates)
gameDetail.import_description: Import game manifest into Steam client. After import, you can view and launch the game from your Steam library.
gameDetail.import_note: Note: Some games may require patch injection after import to work properly.
gameDetail.import_error_no_manifest: No manifest files found, cannot import
gameDetail.extract_play_description: Download complete game files (Deluxe Edition) directly from cloud drive. Extract and play after download, no additional steps required.
gameDetail.extract_play_note: (All are offline versions, unless specifically noted in the cloud drive or you manually inject a multiplayer patch)
gameDetail.quark_scan_hint: Please scan QR code with Quark app to download
gameDetail.trainer_not_exists: Local trainer file does not exist or cannot be read
gameDetail.alert_no_manifest: Manifest folder not found, please download manifest files first
gameDetail.alert_config_saved: Configuration saved, please complete initialization and click import button again.
gameDetail.alert_patch_errors: Patch applied with some errors, please check details
gameDetail.auto_converted_lua: Lua automatically converted to VDF format

about.app_license: This software is free and open source, any form of selling is strictly prohibited

sponsor.page_desc: If you find this program helpful, feel free to sponsor to support the developer's continuous maintenance and updates!

help.error_message: Failed to read help documentation, please ensure resources/README.md file exists

helpWindow.error_message: Failed to read help documentation, please ensure resources/README.md file exists

blank_window.question: Program shows blank/transparent window on launch
blank_window.answer_1: 1. Ensure resources/pic/background/default.png exists in the program root directory
blank_window.answer_2: 2. Check if any antivirus software is blocking the program
blank_window.answer_3: 3. Try deleting %appdata%/SteamToolPlus/config/ directory and restarting the program

download_stuck.question: Game download progress stuck at 0% or freezes at some progress
download_stuck.answer_1: 1. Check if network connection is normal
download_stuck.answer_2: 2. Confirm manifest folder path is correct and contains valid manifest files
download_stuck.answer_3: 3. Check if disk space is sufficient
download_stuck.answer_4: 4. Check ddv20.exe disk usage in Task Manager, if above 5MB/s it's normal, please be patient

wukong_not_start.question: Black Myth: Wukong won't start
wukong_not_start.answer_1: 1. Ensure the game is placed in an English-only path
wukong_not_start.answer_2: 2. If unsure about operations, download the Baidu Cloud patch, remember to extract and double-click the bat file

missing_dll.question: Program won't start, prompts missing DLL files
missing_dll.answer_1: 1. Install the latest Visual C++ Redistributable
missing_dll.answer_2: 2. Ensure WebView2 runtime is installed on the system
missing_dll.answer_3: 3. Try re-downloading and extracting the program

game_not_start_library.question: Game added to library won't launch
game_not_start_library.answer_1: 1. Check if game path is correct, ensure exe file exists
game_not_start_library.answer_2: 2. Confirm game is properly installed or downloaded
game_not_start_library.answer_3: 3. Try running exe directly from game directory to check for error messages
game_not_start_library.answer_4: 4. Check if game requires additional runtime libraries or dependencies

unpack_failed.question: Some games fail to unpack
unpack_failed.answer_1: 1. Some games' executables are not wrapped, you can ignore it
unpack_failed.answer_2: 2. Online or Denuvo games - our no-steam patch won't work

background_not_show.question: Background images won't display
background_not_show.answer_1: 1. Ensure image format is JPG, PNG or WebP
background_not_show.answer_2: 2. Check if image file is corrupted

game_not_start.question: Game won't start
game_not_start.answer_1: 1. Carefully check the patch interface usage instructions
game_not_start.answer_2: 2. Ensure the game is placed in an English-only path
game_not_start.answer_3: 3. Ensure system antivirus hasn't quarantined or deleted patch DLL files

denuvo_service.question: Reports "Cannot start Denuvo service"
denuvo_service.answer_1: 1. Ensure virtual environment is set up (setup instructions below the patch application section)

denuvo_vm_safe.question: Is Denuvo VM safe?
denuvo_vm_safe.answer_1: 1. I've tested most patches, they work fine for playing
denuvo_vm_safe.answer_2: 2. If you want to play, don't worry. If you worry, don't play
denuvo_vm_safe.answer_3: 3. VBS is actually the same principle as this, just maybe with a simpler UI
denuvo_vm_safe.answer_4: 4. Anyone saying virtual environment doesn't need BIOS changes is wrong, CPU must have virtualization enabled
denuvo_vm_safe.answer_5: 5. Secure boot can be left on, but you still need to use advanced boot to run the unofficial signed driver

lanzou_password.question: What's the password for Lanzou Cloud patch files?

steam_not_launched.question: Game shows "Steam is not launched" on launch
steam_not_launched.answer_1: This is a Steam multiplayer game, you need to open Steam to play

gameDetailModal.title: Game Details
gameDetailModal.no_patches_available: No patches available for this game

firstTimeSetup.title: First-Time Configuration
firstTimeSetup.description: First-time use of manifest import requires the following configuration
firstTimeSetup.modal_title: First-Time Setup for Manifest Import (Next time just click the import button, no need for these steps)
firstTimeSetup.step1_text: SteamTools (the Steam icon floating ball on screen, if not there double-click steamtools.exe in tray)
firstTimeSetup.step2_text: Example folder (first time using manifest import, drag the contents of this folder to the _steamtools_ floating icon)
firstTimeSetup.step3_text: Drag all files to the floating window to complete initialization (it will show successfully compiled 1 lua file...)
firstTimeSetup.checkbox_text: I have completed the above configuration

baseConfigModal.custom_broadcasts_hint: One IP or domain per line

completeConfigManager.title: Complete Configuration Manager
completeConfigManager.description: Comprehensive configuration for all emulator features. Each configuration file controls different aspects of the emulator.
completeConfigManager.warning_experimental: Warning: Some features are experimental. Use at your own risk.
completeConfigManager.alert_reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all configurations to default?

advancedConfig.title: Advanced Configuration
advancedConfig.description: Advanced settings for experienced users. Modify these settings only if you understand what they do.
advancedConfig.experimental_warning: Experimental features may cause crashes or instability. Use at your own risk.
advancedConfig.denuvo_vm_warning: Denuvo VM requires virtualization to be enabled in BIOS. Setup tutorial available.
advancedConfig.alert_denuvo_enabled: Denuvo VM enabled. Please ensure virtualization is enabled in BIOS.

mainConfig.title: Main Configuration
mainConfig.description: Core settings for the Steam emulator. These settings control basic emulator behavior.
mainConfig.lan_multiplayer_hint: Allow games to discover each other on local network
mainConfig.custom_broadcasts_hint: One IP or domain per line (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24)
mainConfig.allow_unknown_stats_hint: Allow games to set stats that are not defined in stats.json
mainConfig.new_app_ticket_hint: Use new token format for various APIs
mainConfig.matchmaking_server_list_actual_type_hint: Return proper server list for given type (currently broken)
mainConfig.matchmaking_server_details_via_source_qu: Retrieve actual server info via source server query (currently broken)
mainConfig.enable_experimental_overlay_hint: Enable in-game overlay feature (experimental, may cause crashes)

lanMultiplayerConfig.title: LAN Multiplayer Configuration
lanMultiplayerConfig.description: Configure LAN multiplayer settings. This allows games to discover each other on the local network without Steam.
lanMultiplayerConfig.custom_broadcasts_hint: One IP or domain per line (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24)
lanMultiplayerConfig.auto_accept_invites_hint: Automatically accept game/lobby invites from specified Steam IDs
lanMultiplayerConfig.auto_accept_invites_file_hint: Add Steam IDs (one per line) or leave empty to accept from anyone

overlayConfig.title: In-Game Overlay Configuration
overlayConfig.description: Configure the in-game overlay feature. Note: This is an experimental feature and may cause crashes.
overlayConfig.warning_experimental: Warning: Overlay is an experimental feature. Use at your own risk.
overlayConfig.enable_overlay_hint: Enable the in-game overlay (requires SHIFT+TAB to open)
overlayConfig.achievement_notification_hint: Show notification when an achievement is unlocked
overlayConfig.friend_notification_hint: Show notification when a friend comes online
overlayConfig.low_performance_mode_hint: Reduce overlay resource usage for low-end systems

achievementsConfig.title: Achievements Configuration
achievementsConfig.description: Configure game achievements. Define achievements, their icons, descriptions, and progress.

dlcConfig.title: DLC Configuration
dlcConfig.description: Configure downloadable content (DLC) for the game. Unlock all DLC or configure individual DLC items.
dlcConfig.unlock_all_hint: Automatically unlock all DLC for this game

itemsConfig.title: Items & Inventory Configuration
itemsConfig.description: Configure game items and inventory. Define items, their quantities, and default inventory contents.

statsConfig.title: Statistics Configuration
statsConfig.description: Configure game statistics. Define stat types, default values, and global values.

leaderboardsConfig.title: Leaderboards Configuration
leaderboardsConfig.description: Configure game leaderboards. Define leaderboard names, sort methods, and display types.

controllerConfig.title: Controller Configuration
controllerConfig.description: Configure controller support. Define action sets, button bindings, and controller settings.

steamPatchModal.title: No-Steam Patch
steamPatchModal.description: Apply no-Steam patches to enable game launch without Steam client. Supports LAN multiplayer, achievements, and more.
steamPatchModal.experimental_warning_content:
The experimental build includes advanced features such as:
- In-Game Overlay
- LAN Multiplayer
- Achievement System
- Controller Support

These features are experimental and may cause crashes or instability. Use at your own risk.
steamPatchModal.hint_steam_appid: Game's Steam AppID, can be queried from SteamDB
steamPatchModal.unpack_hint: Use Steamless to remove Steam DRM protection from the game executable
steamPatchModal.status_base_applied: Base configuration has been applied. The game can be launched from the library.
steamPatchModal.confirm_apply_patch:
Are you sure you want to apply the patch to the game directory?

This will replace the game's Steam DLL files.

Original files will be backed up automatically.
